name_cn:
ꫛꫀꪝ
New puzzle version is here
Fresh mini adjustable shoulder strap, summer limited edition patchwork design
Looks younger with visual depth
Puzzle's capacity is always praised
It's not an exaggeration to say it holds the whole world, it's super practical! A stylish must-have for summer~
Size:18*8*12cm
